details.test: Task 1: Favorite free outdoor events for ages 5–8 on Saturday
Task 2: Plan a full Sunday with 3 events in day plan
Task 3: Register for cheapest Saturday morning workshop next month
Task 4: Choose best family membership under 150 and add to cart
Task 5: Save weekly weekday classes for ages 3–4 after 4 PM to watchlist
Task 6: Add playground and storytime from map view to day plan
Task 7: Favorite holiday parade with free parking and holiday lights display under 25
Task 8: Favorite sensory-friendly indoor events for this weekend
